channel.title: CRA Intelligence Briefing
channel.description: Daily and weekly AI-generated podcasts covering credit rating agency industry developments, regulatory news, and risk management insights. Produced via Google NotebookLM from curated intelligence briefings.
channel.itunes:author: CRA Intelligence Briefing

item.title: CRA Daily Briefing — Essentials — March 17, 2026
item.description: Daily CRA intelligence briefing for March 17, 2026. Essentials edition: accessible overview for listeners building their understanding of the credit rating industry.

item.title: CRA Daily Briefing — Expert — March 17, 2026
item.description: Daily CRA intelligence briefing for March 17, 2026. Expert edition: advanced analysis for senior CRA risk management professionals.

item.title: CRA Daily Briefing — Essentials — March 18, 2026
item.description: Daily CRA intelligence briefing for March 18, 2026. Essentials edition: comprehensive credit news coverage with accessible explanation for listeners building their understanding of the credit rating industry.

item.title: CRA Daily Briefing — Expert — March 18, 2026
item.description: Daily CRA intelligence briefing for March 18, 2026. Expert edition: comprehensive credit news coverage with risk management analysis for senior CRA professionals.

item.title: CRA Daily Briefing — Essentials — March 19, 2026
item.description: Daily CRA intelligence briefing for March 19, 2026. Essentials edition: comprehensive credit news coverage with accessible explanation for listeners building their understanding of the credit rating industry.

item.title: CRA Daily Briefing — Expert — March 19, 2026
item.description: Daily CRA intelligence briefing for March 19, 2026. Expert edition: comprehensive credit news coverage with risk management analysis for senior CRA professionals.

item.title: CRA Weekly Recap — Essentials — March 21, 2026
item.description: Weekly CRA intelligence recap for the week ending March 21, 2026. Essentials edition: full week in review with accessible explanation.

item.title: CRA Weekly Recap — Expert — March 21, 2026
item.description: Weekly CRA intelligence recap for the week ending March 21, 2026. Expert edition: full week risk management analysis.

item.title: CRA Briefing — Monday Week Ahead — Essentials — March 23, 2026
item.description: Monday week-ahead briefing for March 23, 2026. Essentials edition: key recent news and what to watch this week, explained accessibly.

item.title: CRA Briefing — Monday Week Ahead — Expert — March 23, 2026
item.description: Monday week-ahead briefing for March 23, 2026. Expert edition: risk management lens on the week ahead.
